examples: On one of the dirty buff-colored walls were a couple of shelves, containing in all perhaps a dozen bottles and jars.
Judge Lanier is a real film buff.
He took a largish buff envelope from his pocket.
To buff STAC's impartial image, Lankford and crew roam industry events in white lab coats.
Mr. Smith, a fellow "Gatsby" fan and Nintendo buff, was easily sold on the concept.
